title: Numbers and Data: Reports and Figures
subtitle: Present numbers, compare figures, and talk about results
fit:
<!-- SCENARIO FIT — Aula 9
Can-do: "I can present numbers, compare figures, and talk about basic financial results."
Gramatica-alvo: numbers (large numbers, %, decimals), comparatives/superlatives (higher than, the highest), financial basics.
Vocab-alvo: increase, decrease, profit, growth, quarter, forecast, figure, percentage.
Cenario escolhido: Rafael apresenta os numeros do 1o trimestre para a parceira Sarah numa chamada.
Por que elicita o alvo: apresentar resultados OBRIGA ler numeros, comparar divisoes e usar vocab financeiro. Aderencia >= 90%.
-->
<!-- CONTINUIDADE — Aula 9
